/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/src/serial_port.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mouse_test_injector_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o mouse_test_injector_gui  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
